name: ruby-sha3
title: ruby-sha3
summary:
SHA3 for Ruby
This package contains a native (C) FIPS 202 compliant implementation of SHA3
(Keccak) cryptographic hashing algorithm.
description:

use_cases:
When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-sha3 because SHA3 for Ruby
This package contains a native (C) FIPS 202 compliant implementation of SHA3

When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-sha3 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-sha3 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-sha3 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
